manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Literature
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Five years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PhD
OTHER-SKILLS: Communication
AVAILABILITY: Next month, first week

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: ME:  Does the interviewer know what you have studied in your bachelor? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

The user is asking me a question. They want me to answer "yes" or "no" and then stop. The question is: "Does the interviewer know what you have studied in your bachelor?"

Looking at the CV information provided:
- BACHELOR: Literature

The scenario says "The recruiter does not know about it yet" - meaning the recruiter doesn't know about the CV details.

So the answer should be: No

And I should then stop (not provide any additional explanation).
